**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Haozhushou Machinery Equipment Co., Ltd. is an extremely typical case of 'commercial standard mismatch' and a specimen of an equipment proxy forcefully affiliated with the manufacturing industry. The severely fabricated Apple Inc. supply chain network at the bottom layer has been fully cleansed. Because its name contains 'Machinery Equipment,' the official system unhesitatingly categorized it into 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturing.' However, the forensic engine directly called upon physical and financial data to shatter this illusion: this is a micro-enterprise with a 2024 insured headcount of only '2 people,' a paid-in capital of 660,000 RMB, and registered in 'Building F2' on Zhongshan East Road (typically an office building or commercial podium). In a commercial building, relying on 2 people to 'manufacture' electrical machinery is absolutely impossible. Looking throughout its business license, there are uniformly words like 'sales,' 'wholesale,' and 'leasing' (mechanical equipment sales, hardware product wholesale, CNC machine tool sales, etc.), with absolutely no permits for 'production' or 'manufacturing' visible. Diagnostic conclusion: this is a pure Micro-Trading Agency for electromechanical equipment and hardware accessories/leasing company. Its true business is to buy and sell CNC machine tools, refrigeration equipment, and hardware molds based on import/export qualifications or channels, or to provide equipment leasing services, completely lacking any physical manufacturing capability.
